name: Betty T. Yee
background: Former California State Controller, former state budget director, former elected member of the State Board of Equalization. Uncovered $7.3 billion in misspending. Endorsed by Progressive Democrats of America, Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders Victory Fund, National Women's Political Caucus of California.
statement: We can't fix the affordability crisis without a Governor who can fix the state budget. The ongoing budget problem is hurting investments in our schools, health care, housing, child care, seniors, and the environment. I am the only candidate who served as a state budget director, an elected member of the State Board of Equalization, and State Controller. I ruled against corporations and the wealthy, making sure they paid their fair share of taxes. I uncovered $7.3 billion in misspending. I never borrowed externally to pay the state's bills. I protected the retirement funds for school employees. This is what hardworking Californians expect and deserve, an experienced leader who works for them. Every day, families make tough economic choices about what bills to pay and what to go without. I see this as I help families navigate elder care and child care needs. We can't allow families to fall further behind. And we must not saddle the next generation with costs that will curtail their ability to succeed and thrive. We can, however, invest in our people, growing our economy by creating good-paying jobs in every corner of the state.

positions.economy: Fix state budget; ensure corporations and wealthy pay fair share of taxes; create good-paying jobs statewide
positions.education: Increase investment in schools and child care
positions.fiscalResponsibility: Budget reform, eliminate misspending, no external borrowing
